zh.Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.of Storeton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Bamville於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓時，他的父親Alexander de Bamville76歲，母親Rose de Stourton66歲。他於1222年與Agnes de Stourton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1260年享年52歲。

zh-hans.Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾
zh-hans.of Storeton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Bamville于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓时，他的父亲Alexander de Bamville76岁，母亲Rose de Stourton66岁。他于1222年与Agnes de Stourton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1260年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bamville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Alban, Andre, Armand, Benoit.
French and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, France, recorded in the 13th century as Badanvilla ‘estate of a woman called Bada’. Compare Banfield .

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

variants.name: Banwell
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name from Banwell in Somerset, named from Old English bana ‘killer’ + wella ‘stream, spring’.
English: habitational name from Banwell Farm in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Banville   or   Banfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Bamville was born about 1210, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander de Bamville, was 76 and his mother, Rose de Stourton, was 66. He married Agnes de Stourton in 1222, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1260, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Bamville est né environ 1210, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander de Bamville, avait 76 ans et sa mère, Rose de Stourton, avait 66 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Stourton en 1222, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1260, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Bamville um 1210 in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander de Bamville 76 und seine Mutter Rose de Stourton 66. Er hat 1222 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1260 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bamville è nato il circa 1210 nel Storeton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander de Bamville, aveva 76 anni e il suo madre, Rose de Stourton, aveva 66 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Stourton nel 1222, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1260, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bamvilleが約1210年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Alexander de Bamvilleは76歳，母Rose de Stourtonは66歳であった。1222年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAgnes de Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1260年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bamville(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Bamville(은)는 76세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose de Stourton(은)는 66세였다. 그는 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Agnes de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1260년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bamville nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander de Bamville, tinha 76 anos e sua mãe, Rose de Stourton, tinha 66 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Stourton em 1222, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1260, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Bamville родился около 1210 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander de Bamville было 76 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose de Stourton, 66. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Stourton в 1222 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1260 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Bamville nació aproximadamente 1210, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander de Bamville, tenía 76 años y su mamá, Rose de Stourton, tenía 66 años. Se casó con Agnes de Stourton en 1222, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1260, a la edad de 52 años.
